papers.title: Mapping Urban Villages in China: Progress and Challenges
papers.abstract: The shift toward high-quality urbanization has brought increased attention to the issue of "urban villages", which has become a prominent social problem in China. papers.title: Coverage and Bias of Street View Imagery in Mapping the Urban Environment
papers.abstract: Street View Imagery (SVI) has emerged as a valuable data form in urban studies, enabling new ways to map and sense urban environments.
